examples: The court pronounced him guilty and sentenced him to death by electrocution.
Six people were drowned; five died from electrocution.
Their wings can bridge the gap between lines, resulting in electrocution if they touch two lines at once.
The electricity remains disconnected because of fire and electrocution risks from damaged wiring.
Unicef also identified road accidents, burns, falls, animal bites, electrocution and suffocation as other causes of serious injury and death.
